title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-1130
summary: Atanu Mondal, the husband of the complainant, applied for anticipatory bail in a case under IPC Sections 498A and 406. The complainant had left the matrimonial home, and the petitioner claimed the allegations were vague and that a prior DV case had been filed by the mother-in-law against the comp...
